narration: Meta-analysis combines results from different studies to find patterns. Think of it as pooling knowledge!

ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Meta-analysis combines results from different studies to find patterns. Think of it as pooling knowledge!

narration: But why is this important? It helps us see the bigger picture in research.

narration: Research shows that meta-analyses can provide more reliable conclusions than single studies, especially in complex fields.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Research shows that meta-analyses can provide more reliable conclusions than single studies, especially in complex field

narration: However, not all meta-analyses are created equal. Always check the quality of the studies included.
